title: Director partner
description:
Our client is seeking a Marketing Director to join their team!

Are you a creative leader with a passion for driving marketing success? This role offers a unique opportunity to shape and lead the marketing strategy of a renowned organization. You will be responsible for guiding the marketing team, developing comprehensive marketing plans, and ensuring the brand's visibility and growth. If you thrive in a dynamic environment and are ready to take your career to the next level, this is the perfect role for you.

About Our Client

A leading company in the industry, committed to providing exceptional services and innovative solutions. Our client is dedicated to excellence and is looking for a Marketing Director who can help drive their marketing efforts to new heights.

Other Information:

  • Working Day: 5 days

  • Working Hour: 9am-6pm

  • Working Location: City Hall

  • Salary Range: $13,000

What you'll be doing?

  • Lead the marketing team: Provide direction, guidance, and leadership to ensure the marketing department achieves its goals.

  • Develop marketing strategies: Create and implement marketing plans that align with the company's objectives and market demands.

  • Conduct market research: Analyze competitors and market trends to identify opportunities for growth and improvement.

  • Communicate marketing plans: Clearly articulate the marketing strategy to stakeholders and ensure alignment across the organization.

  • Build brand awareness: Develop initiatives to enhance brand recognition and positioning in the market.

  • Manage marketing projects: Oversee the execution of marketing projects from inception to completion, ensuring timely and successful delivery.

  • Oversee advertising campaigns: Create and manage effective advertising campaigns to reach the target audience and drive sales.

  • Support sales efforts: Collaborate with the sales team to support lead generation and customer acquisition strategies.

  • Manage social media: Oversee the company's social media marketing strategy to engage with the audience and build online presence.

  • Understand financial aspects: Develop and manage marketing budgets, including research and development appropriations, expenditures, and profit-loss projections.

Who are they looking for?

  • Education: A Bachelor’s degree in business, marketing, communications, or a related field is required.

  • Experience: Minimum of 3 years in a similar position with experience in managing a team.

  • Marketing expertise: Proven experience in developing and executing successful marketing campaigns.

  • Time management: Ability to effectively manage multiple tasks and prioritize responsibilities.

  • Copywriting skills: Strong ability to create compelling marketing content.

Why should you consider this opportunity?

Our client offers an attractive remuneration package and other benefits, such as:

  • Competitive salary

  • Comprehensive benefits package

  • Opportunities for professional growth

How to apply

Ready to join this role? Click Apply now to submit your resume and share your availability and expected salary with us!

We welcome all qualified candidates to apply, regardless of their background or experience.

All information received will be kept strictly confidential and will be used only for employment-related purposes.

LIN SPA 53222422A

ZHANG XIAOMAN
